items.title: Colts, Daniel Jones agree on new contract
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The Indianapolis Colts and Daniel Jones are transitioning from the transition tag. The team and its starting quarterback agreed on a 2-year, $88 million extension that replaces the one-year, $37.833 million transition tag that was put in place March 3, according to a source. Jones could earn up to $100 million in incentives [...]
